Ntc And Mtn For Order Consolidating Actions
Off Calendar Jan-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANDREW LEWIS'S Motion for Order Consolidating actions 480160 and 460032.
Ruling: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Andrew Lewis's Motion for Order consolidating actions is granted. No Opposition filed. (302/PHA) Case 460032 is designated as the lead case. Cases are consolidated for all purposes. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Connie J. Parchman, CSR 6137
